title: Economic Discourse
description: Macro vocabulary: inflation, GDP, monetary policy, supply chain, market sentiment.
summary_pt_br: Vocabulário macro: inflação, PIB, juros, política monetária, cadeia de suprimentos, recessão, sentimento.

scenes.subtitle_en: Macro vocabulary: inflation, GDP, monetary policy, supply chain, market sentiment.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Vocabulário macro: inflação, PIB, juros, política monetária, cadeia de suprimentos, recessão, sentimento.

scenes.text_en: Macro vocabulary: inflation, GDP, monetary policy, supply chain, market sentiment. Focus: economic discourse. Rising interest rates have cooled the housing market.
scenes.text_pt: Vocabulário macro: inflação, PIB, juros, política monetária, cadeia de suprimentos, recessão, sentimento. Foco: economic discourse. Juros em alta esfriaram o mercado imobiliário.

scenes.title: Economic Discourse
scenes.body_en: Key terms: INFLATION, GDP (gross domestic product), INTEREST RATES, MONETARY POLICY, SUPPLY CHAIN, RECESSION, BULL/BEAR MARKET, MARKET SENTIMENT.
scenes.body_pt: Vocabulário macro: inflação, PIB, juros, política monetária, cadeia de suprimentos, recessão, sentimento.

examples.en: Rising interest rates have cooled the housing market.
examples.pt: Juros em alta esfriaram o mercado imobiliário.

examples.en: Inflation remains the central bank's top concern.
examples.pt: A inflação continua sendo a principal preocupação do BC.

examples.en: Supply chain disruptions affect pricing globally.
examples.pt: Disrupções na cadeia afetam preços globalmente.

exercise.question: Complete: "Rising ___ rates have cooled the housing market."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Rising interest rates have cooled the housing market."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Juros em alta esfriaram o mercado imobiliário.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Inflation remains the central bank's top concern.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Inflation remains the central bank's top concern."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A inflação continua sendo a principal preocupação do BC.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Economic Discourse — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre economic discourse. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What's your read on the current economy?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Inflation cooling, but recession risk remains.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How do interest rates factor in?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Rising rates slow borrowing and growth.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Economics in English is half vocabulary, half humility.

scenes.title: The markets briefing
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize the economic view. Use at least three economic terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the Monday markets briefing, Joca's firm gathered to review the week's central-bank signals.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Inflation cooled for the third consecutive month, though recession risk has not entirely subsided yet.

paragraphs.speaker: Analyst
paragraphs.en: Rising interest rates continue to slow lending, and consumer sentiment remains tilted bearish.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Supply chain bottlenecks have eased globally, but semiconductor shortages persist in key verticals.

paragraphs.speaker: Analyst
paragraphs.en: Monetary policy, at this juncture, resembles a careful balancing act between growth and stability.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Economic English, Joca said, forces you to speak about the future with the grammar of present humility.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Economic Discourse". Macro vocabulary: inflation, GDP, monetary policy, supply chain, market sentiment. Rising interest rates have cooled the housing market. Inflation remains the central bank's top concern. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Economic Discourse". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.

sources.label: The Economist · Learning English
sources.pt_hint: Jornalismo econômico e político sofisticado — nível C1+.

sources.label: The New Yorker · essays
sources.pt_hint: Ensaios literários e jornalísticos — prosa rica.
